Selected work

Projects

in progress 2025-01

Vulnerability Assessment Framework

A modular, automated framework for conducting structured vulnerability assessments on small network environments — built as a senior capstone project.

BashPythonNmapOpenVAS
forensics 2024-03

Network Traffic Anomaly Detector

A machine-learning pipeline that identifies anomalous network traffic patterns by analyzing pcap files and flagging deviations from learned baselines.

PythonScikit-learnWiresharkPandas
offensive 2024-01

CTF Write-up Collection

A curated collection of write-ups from competitive Capture the Flag competitions, documenting methodology, tools, and thought process for each challenge solved.

BashPythonGDBBurp Suite
All projects

Philosophy reading list

Books shaping my thinking

Friedrich Nietzsche 1886

Beyond Good and Evil

"The will to power is not aggression — it is the drive to become what you are."
Marcus Aurelius 170

Meditations

"A private journal that became one of the most precise operating manuals for living under pressure."
Plato 375 BCE

The Republic

"The cave is not a metaphor for ignorance — it's a description of the default state."
